column_mapping.effective_to: CAST(CASE WHEN supplier_status = 'Inactive' THEN created_date ELSE NULL END AS date)
column_mapping.supplier_contract_end_date: CAST(CASE WHEN supplier_status = 'Inactive' THEN created_date ELSE NULL END AS date)
column_mapping.preferred_supplier_flag: CAST(CASE WHEN supplier_tier = 'Tier 1' AND risk_rating IN ('Low','Medium') AND supplier_status = 'Active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS boolean)
